title: Calculate power

content.problemStatement: Write a function named **calculatePower** that takes two integer, **base** and **exponent** respectively, and returns the result of raising **base** to the power of **exponent**.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains two space‑separated integers: base and exponent.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output base raised to the power exponent on a separate line.

solution.approach: We need to compute base^exponent for each test case. Using the binary (fast) exponentiation method we repeatedly square the base and multiply it to the result whenever the current exponent bit is 1. This runs in O(log exponent) time and O(1) extra space, which easily satisfies the limits.
solution.timeComplexity: O(log exponent) per test case, O(T·log exponent) total
